userStories.title: Disable parallel subagent fan-out for kanban autonomous runs
acceptanceCriteria: The Ralph worker verifies the repo state from disk before making decisions and limits itself to the active story
Kanban or autonomous card runs no longer use concurrent Promise.allSettled fan-out for subagent prompts
Kanban or autonomous card runs either disable use_subagents entirely or enforce maxParallelSubagentsPerRun=1 with serial execution
scripts/ralph/progress.txt is updated with proof commands, changed files, learnings, and any blocker for this story
Set passes=true only if the repo now contains a concrete, repo-verifiable implementation of the fan-out guard
userStories.notes: Target the existing kanban/autonomous execution path, not all subagent usage globally. Do not create commits.

userStories.title: Add a persisted kanban run coordinator with lease heartbeat retry and cleanup ownership
acceptanceCriteria: A kanban-owned run coordinator or equivalent control-plane abstraction exists in the repo
The run state persists runId, cardId, sessionId, workspacePath, status, attempt, leaseExpiresAt, heartbeatAt, retryDueAt, childPids, lastError, and proofBundle
Startup reconciliation exists and requeues, expires, or cleans up stale runs before new work starts
Retry metadata and cleanup ownership are attached to the coordinator rather than left implicit inside worker sessions
scripts/ralph/progress.txt is updated with proof commands, changed files, learnings, and any blocker for this story
Set passes=true only if the repo now contains concrete persisted-state and reconciliation wiring for the coordinator
userStories.notes: Reuse small JSON snapshot persistence for MVP. Do not add a database. Do not create commits.

userStories.title: Require per-card worktree isolation and proof-of-work before Human Review
acceptanceCriteria: Autonomous kanban card runs execute inside dedicated git worktrees under a deterministic runtime root
Run metadata records the branch or worktree path used by the card run
Cards cannot advance to Human Review until a proof bundle is present and validated by the control plane
The MVP proof bundle contains validation command evidence, outcome, changed-files summary, workspace or branch identity, latest commit SHA if present, and optional UI artifact path
scripts/ralph/progress.txt is updated with proof commands, changed files, learnings, and any blocker for this story
Set passes=true only if the repo now contains concrete worktree isolation and Human Review proof gating behavior
userStories.notes: Do not switch to full repo clones or remote workers. Keep the MVP local and minimally invasive. Do not create commits.
